title: Глубокий анализ MyPy ошибок — сбор проблемного кода

problems.error_message: Item "ChatMemberOwner" of "ChatMemberOwner | ChatMemberAdministrator" has no attribute "can_post_messages"
problems.code_context:
if isinstance(member, ChatMemberAdministrator | ChatMemberOwner):
    can_post = bool(member.can_post_messages)
    can_delete = bool(member.can_delete_messages)
    can_pin = bool(member.can_pin_messages) if require_pin else True
problems.fix_hint: ChatMemberOwner doesn't have can_post_messages - need separate handling for owner vs admin

problems.error_message: Item "ChatMemberOwner" of "ChatMemberOwner | ChatMemberAdministrator" has no attribute "can_delete_messages"
Item "ChatMemberOwner" of "ChatMemberOwner | ChatMemberAdministrator" has no attribute "can_pin_messages"
Argument "chat_id" to "unpin_chat_message" of "Bot" has incompatible type "int | None"; expected "int | str"
problems.fix_hint: Add guard: if channel.telegram_id is None: raise ValueError()

problems.error_message: Argument 1 to "delete_message" of "Bot" has incompatible type "int | None"; expected "int | str"

problems.fix_hint: PlacementStatus.COMPLETED doesn't exist - check enum values
type: ignore comment placed incorrectly - should be at end of line after function call

problems.error_message: Incompatible return value type (got "PlacementRequest | None", expected "PlacementRequest")
problems.fix_hint: Add guard: if result is None: raise ValueError()

type_ignores_added_by_p17.code_context: await _notify_create_request(placement, advertiser, owner, channel)  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call]
await _notify_owner_accept  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call](result, advertiser, channel)  [INVALID SYNTAX]
await _notify_rejected  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call](result, advertiser, channel)  [INVALID SYNTAX]
await _notify_counter_offer  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call](result, advertiser, channel)  [INVALID SYNTAX]
await _notify_counter_accepted  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call](result, advertiser, owner, channel)  [INVALID SYNTAX]
await _notify_cancelled  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call](result, advertiser, owner, channel, delta)  [INVALID SYNTAX]
await _notify_payment_received  # type: ignore[no-untyped-call](result, advertiser, owner, channel)  [INVALID SYNTAX]

notify_functions_signatures.name: _notify_cancelled
notify_functions_signatures.signature: async def _notify_cancelled(placement, advertiser, owner, channel, reputation_delta=0.0):

chat_member_usage.code_context:
member = await bot.get_chat_member(chat_id, bot.id)
if isinstance(member, ChatMemberAdministrator | ChatMemberOwner):
    can_post = bool(member.can_post_messages)
    can_delete = bool(member.can_delete_messages)
    can_pin = bool(member.can_pin_messages) if require_pin else True
chat_member_usage.issue: ChatMemberOwner doesn't have can_post_messages, can_delete_messages, can_pin_messages attributes

critical_fixes_needed.fix: Separate handling for ChatMemberOwner vs ChatMemberAdministrator - owner always has all permissions
Add None check before using telegram_id in bot methods
Check PlacementStatus enum - use correct status value

critical_fixes_needed.issue: type: ignore comments have invalid syntax
critical_fixes_needed.fix: Move type: ignore to end of line after function call, not before arguments
Add proper type annotations to all _notify_* functions OR add module-level type: ignore

critical_fixes_needed.issue: return-value errors - functions may return None
critical_fixes_needed.fix: Add None guards before return statements

notes: Most errors are in files outside the 4 target files (channel_settings.py, placement.py, arbitration.py, billing.py)
payout_service.py and publication_tasks.py have 0 errors - they are clean
The 6 errors in publication_service.py are all CRITICAL runtime risks
The 15 errors in placement_request_service.py are mostly syntax errors from P17's type: ignore attempts
7 type: ignore comments added by P17 have invalid syntax - placed before function arguments instead of at end of line
_notify_* functions need proper type annotations or module-level type: ignore
